positive: A mystical celestial creature (like a phoenix or griffin) intertwined with stylized bioluminescent flora and celestial constellations. The composition must be highly centralized, featuring clean, strong black silhouettes against a limited, vibrant gradient background of deep indigo and cosmic teal. Use a highly detailed etching or woodcut style mixed with glowing, iridescent vaporwave elements. The focus must be on symmetry and clear, high-contrast lines, suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment transfer. Include floating abstract orbs and geometric sacred geometry patterns to fill the negative space without cluttering the main subject.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, text, words, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, distorted, low resolution, monochrome only, solid colors only
